subject: [PATCH v4 13/21] swap: manage swap entry lifecycle at the virtual swap layer

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the swap count field size and suggested adding a check for swap_count_continued in vswap_free().

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch moves swap entry lifecycle management to the virtual swap layer, introducing two new fields in the swap descriptor: 'in_swapcache' and 'swap count'. It re-implements existing API functions in the virtual swap layer, simplifying logic by not implementing swap count continuation.
